title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of March 26
text: A weekly summary of dividend activity for Dividend Champions, Contenders, and Challengers. Companies which changed their dividends.

title: C.H. Robinson going slow on a new CEO
text: A couple of weeks ago, it had become apparent by the many headlines that C.H. Robinson Worldwide Inc. (NASDAQ: CHRW) had zeroed in on Jim Barber, former chief operating officer of UPS Inc. (NYSE: UPS), to become its next CEO.

title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Rides on Solid Freight Market, Cost Ails
text: Improving freight market conditions are supporting C.H. Robinson's (CHRW) top line.

title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Likely to Get a Permanent CEO Soon
text: Jim Barber is likely to be C.H. Robinson's (CHRW) new CEO.

title: 12 Stocks Up Big This Year Are Due For A Nasty Fall, Analysts Say
text: Hope you enjoyed the rally in S&P 500 stocks this year while it lasted. Analysts are already calling for some of the biggest gainers to fall.

title: Why Is C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Down 3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Analysis: Holifield had envisioned different LaserShip/OnTrac, so he stepped away
text: It may never be known exactly why Mark Holifield stepped down as CEO of regional parcel delivery carrier LaserShip/OnTrac. What can be deduced from Holifield's departure, announced Tuesday, is the reasons that brought him to the company in late 2021 were no longer as compelling in March 2023.
